full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Generating the LLM disclosure JSON files for all 10 tasks
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Create all 10 LLM disclosure JSON files (llm_task_1_1.json through llm_task_4_2.json) following the Part A structure with additional Part B fields: task_tag, code_used_verbatim (boolean), and student_modification (when code_used_verbatim=true). Include top_5_prompts and student_declaration sections.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the JSON structure for all 10 disclosure files with consistent formatting, proper field names, and the required Part B extensions.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reviewed each JSON file to ensure: (a) task_tag matches the filename, (b) code_used_verbatim is set correctly for interaction types (true for code prompts, false for text/explanation prompts), (c) student_modification is filled whenever code_used_verbatim=true, (d) top_5_prompts reference valid interaction_ids.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Create all 10 LLM disclosure JSON files with Part B fields: task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Single prompt that generated the structure for all disclosure files — the entire deliverable of Task 4.2.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.2 of Part B.
